subject: IBAS trigger 10375 is not a GRB
body:
D. Gotz (CEA Saclay), E. Bozzo, C.Ferrigno, V. Savchenko (Uni Genève) and S. Mereghetti (INAF-IASF) report on behalf of the IBAS Team:
The IBAS Trigger 10375 is not due to a GRB, but most likely to a new galactic source, since previous weak triggers from the same direction have been detected starting at 12:20 UT, culminating in a series of more significant triggers between 17.17 and 18:18 UT on August 24th 2023. This conclusion is cohrent with the one presented by Kennea et al. (GCN 34540).
